title: Fix: Date parsing bug
original_text: Fixed date parsing bug for timezones. Dates were being incorrectly parsed for different timezones. Implemented timezone-aware date parsing. Added date format validation. Implemented DST handling. Added date parsing tests. Result: date parsing bug fixed.
expected_subject: fix(core): fix date parsing bug for timezones
expected_body_lines: - Fix dates incorrectly parsed for timezones
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(core): fix date parsing bug for timezones"
